# Frontend Educational Content Checklist: Prerrequisitos SDD

**Purpose**: Validate the completeness, clarity, and understandability of frontend requirements for presenting SDD prerequisites to readers
**Created**: 2026-05-19
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Content Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 - Are all 3 prerequisite categories (Técnicos, Metodológicos, Herramientas) explicitly defined with visual distinction requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 - Is the complete list of 10 fixed prerequisites enumerated with their display properties (name, description, level, resources)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Clarifications]
- [ ] CHK003 - Are the visual requirements for each prerequisite detail element defined (name, explanation, suggested level, recommended resources)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK004 - Is the checklist interaction model specified (checkboxes, evaluate button, expand/collapse behavior)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK005 - Are all 3 verdict states ("Ready para SDD", "Casi listo", "Faltan bases") defined with their visual presentation requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK006 - Is the suggested preparation route display requirements defined for 2+ gaps scenarios? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK007 - Are the cross-link requirements to related site sections (Git → Proceso E2E, testing → Anatomía de Specs) explicitly mapped? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK008 - Is the section introduction and heading content requirements specified? [Completeness, Gap]

## Content Clarity

- [ ] CHK009 - Is "nivel sugerido" (básico/intermedio/avanzado) defined with reader-understandable descriptions, not just labels? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK010 - Are resource types (tutorial/documentación/ejemplo) defined with visual distinction requirements so readers can differentiate them? [Clarity, Spec §Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK011 - Is the verdict threshold logic (0 gaps → Ready, 1-2 → Casi listo, 3+ → Faltan bases) expressed in reader-friendly language? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK012 - Is the "dependencia" ordering for the suggested route explained in terms a reader can understand? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK013 - Are the "por qué es necesario para SDD" explanations required to be written in non-technical language? [Clarity, Gap]

## Visual Hierarchy & Readability

- [ ] CHK014 - Are visual hierarchy requirements defined for category headings vs individual prerequisites vs resource links? [Clarity, Gap]
- [ ] CHK015 - Is the information density per screen defined (how much content is visible without scrolling)? [Clarity, Gap]
- [ ] CHK016 - Are the expand/collapse visual state indicators specified (arrow icons, text changes, aria-expanded)? [Consistency, Spec §Plan T027]
- [ ] CHK017 - Is the color semantics for verdict states defined (green/yellow/red) with accessibility alternatives? [Clarity, Spec §Tasks T014]
- [ ] CHK018 - Are the checkbox sizing and spacing requirements specified for readability and touch targets? [Coverage, Gap]

## Interaction State Consistency

- [ ] CHK019 - Are the visual requirements for unchecked vs checked checkbox states consistently defined? [Consistency, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK020 - Are the expanded vs collapsed prerequisite detail states visually distinguished with consistent patterns? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK021 - Are the hover/focus/active states defined for all interactive elements (checkboxes, buttons, expandable items, resource links)? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK022 - Is the "Evaluar preparación" button state requirements defined (enabled/disabled, loading, result displayed)? [Completeness, Gap]
- [ ] CHK023 - Are the localStorage persistence indicators defined (how does the reader know their progress is saved)? [Coverage, Spec §FR-007]

## Scenario Coverage (Reader-Facing)

- [ ] CHK024 - Are requirements defined for the first-time visitor scenario (no prior evaluation, empty state)? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK025 - Are requirements defined for the returning visitor scenario (previously saved progress loaded from localStorage)? [Coverage, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK026 - Are requirements defined for the "all prerequisites met" celebration/confirmation state? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK027 - Are requirements defined for the reader who has gaps but wants to understand prerequisites before evaluating? [Coverage, Spec §US2]
- [ ] CHK028 - Are requirements defined for the reader who only cares about one category (e.g., only technical prerequisites)? [Coverage, Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK029 - Is the fallback behavior defined when external resource URLs are broken or unreachable? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK030 - Is the display behavior specified when localStorage is unavailable (private browsing, disabled)? [Edge Case, Gap]
- [ ] CHK031 - Is the content behavior defined when resource links become outdated (verification date display, warning message)? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK032 - Is the responsive behavior defined for very small screens where category cards may stack? [Edge Case, Spec §Tasks T026]
- [ ] CHK033 - Is the behavior specified when the reader rapidly toggles checkboxes before clicking evaluate? [Edge Case, Gap]

## Accessibility & Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK034 - Are keyboard navigation requirements specified for the entire checklist flow (tab order, Enter/Space activation)? [Coverage, Spec §Plan Constitution, Tasks T027]
- [ ] CHK035 - Are screen reader requirements defined for dynamic content updates (verdict changes, expand/collapse announcements)? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK036 - Is the color contrast requirement specified for verdict states and interactive elements (WCAG AA)? [Coverage, Spec §Plan]
- [ ] CHK037 - Are the content language requirements specified (Spanish-only, or i18n-ready structure)? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK038 - Is the <2 second load time requirement (SC-005) specified with measurement conditions for the educational content section? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005]

## Content Accuracy & Maintenance

- [ ] CHK039 - Are the requirements for keeping prerequisite content accurate and up-to-date defined (review cadence, ownership)? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK040 - Is the version indicator and last-updated date display requirement specified for reader trust? [Completeness, Spec §Tasks T028]
- [ ] CHK041 - Are the requirements for validating external resource links before publication defined? [Gap]

## Notes

- Items with [Gap] indicate requirements that appear undocumented or incomplete in the current spec
- Items with [Ambiguity] indicate terms or logic that need clarification
- Items with [Consistency] check for alignment across spec sections
- This checklist tests the quality of the *requirements*, not the implementation
- Focus: Frontend educational content presentation for reader comprehension
